category_sources: Official gpsim homepage says gpsim is a full-featured software simulator for Microchip PIC microcontrollers.
source_facts.description says gpsim is a simulator for Microchip PIC microcontrollers.
docs_sources: Official gpsim homepage links current documentation as HTML, PDF, and PostScript; HTML documentation includes CLI, GUI, scripting, and module chapters.
repo_sources: Official gpsim homepage states current SVN source can be browsed using the gpsim SourceForge SVN browser and links the SVN code browser.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes PIC simulation, breakpoints, single stepping, disassembly, memory inspection, CLI, and GTK GUI.
source_facts.description identifies Microchip PIC simulator purpose.
